prompt: Trace the early history of the Meadowbrook Herbarium in Meadowbrook. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Give the final answer as exactly three bullets labeled Answer, Evidence, and Caveat; include the source ID in Evidence.

results.title: Meadowbrook Herbarium — official operator
results.snippet: Meadowbrook Natural History Society is the responsible organization for the Meadowbrook Herbarium in Meadowbrook.

fetch_primary.title: Meadowbrook Herbarium accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Meadowbrook Herbarium began in the conservatory workroom at Alder Estate. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.

fetch_alternate.title: Alternate official record for Meadowbrook Herbarium
fetch_alternate.content: The archived founding memorandum states that the Meadowbrook Herbarium was first housed in the conservatory workroom at Alder Estate.
